title: gentiana choanantha subsp. choanantha
intro: Gentiana choanantha subsp. choanantha, also known as Choan's Gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae), native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gentiana choanantha subsp. choanantha include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation and pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties to combat infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and immune function.
